.github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml.general_idea: Add a step to set up JDK 17 in the GitHub Actions workflow to support the migration target.
.github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml.after:
- name: Set up JDK 17
  uses: actions/setup-java@v3
  with:
    java-version: '17'
    distribution: 'temurin'
    cache: maven

.github/workflows/codeql-analysis.yml.general_idea: Update the CodeQL init action from v1 to v2.
Update the CodeQL autobuild action from v1 to v2.
Update the CodeQL analyze action from v1 to v2.

.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the GitHub Actions checkout action from version 2 to version 3.
Upgrade the GitHub Actions setup-java action from version 2 to version 3.
Change the Java distribution provider from 'adopt' to 'temurin' to align with the new Adoptium branding.
Update the Java version used in the CI pipeline from 11 to 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lms-canvas-iu-custom-services dependency for IU-specific functionality.
Add lms-canvas-iu-custom-services test-jar dependency for testing IU-specific functionality.
Add H2 in-memory database dependency for testing purposes.
Add springdoc-openapi-ui dependency for API documentation generation.
Configure spring-boot-maven-plugin to generate build-info metadata.
Add new packages to hibernate5-ddl-maven-plugin configuration for schema generation.
Add frontend-maven-plugin to manage Node.js and npm installation and execution during build.

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Add Spring Boot auto-configuration annotation for IU-only client integration.
Add Spring Boot auto-configuration annotation for course session service integration.
Add a resource handler for static images to serve them from the classpath.
Uncomment and enable the resource handler for jsreact assets.
Uncomment and implement the addInterceptors method to register a CORS interceptor.
Rename inner configuration classes to remove legacy 'CourseUnlocker' prefix and generic 'Adapter' suffix for better clarity.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.after: public static class RestSecurityConfigurationAdapter extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Rename inner configuration class to 'AppSecurityConfigurerAdapter' to reflect its broader application scope.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.after: public static class AppSecurityConfigurerAdapter extends WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Update import to use DefaultInstructorRoleRepository instead of LmsDefaultGrantedAuthoritiesMapper.
Add /api/** to the request matchers for the REST security configuration.
Permit all access to /api/** endpoints in the REST security configuration.
Permit all access to /rest/popup/** endpoints in the REST security configuration.
Disable CSRF protection for /rest/popup/** endpoints.
Replace LmsDefaultGrantedAuthoritiesMapper field with DefaultInstructorRoleRepository.
Add /error and /tool/** to the request matchers for the App security configuration.
Permit all access to /error endpoint in the App security configuration.
Require INSTRUCTOR_ROLE for /tool/** endpoints in the App security configuration.
Update Lti13Configurer to use CustomRoleMapper with DefaultInstructorRoleRepository instead of LmsDefaultGrantedAuthoritiesMapper.
Expand WebSecurity ignoring rules to include static assets like jsreact, webjars, css, js, images, and favicon.
Add new configuration properties for template hosting URL and hierarchy root node name.
src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.after:
private String templateHostingUrl;
private String hierarchyRootNodeName;

src/main/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Add new service dependencies (CanvasService, CourseSessionService) required for new functionality.
Refactor launch endpoint to a loading page that prepares model attributes for the subsequent index view.
Update index endpoint path and logic to handle session cleanup and conditional view rendering based on completion status.
Add new POST endpoint to handle menu choices and redirect to specific wizard sections (Import, Template, Homepage).
Add new POST endpoint to handle exiting the wizard and redirecting back to Canvas.
Add helper method to generate the URL for the Canvas Content Migrations tool.
Add helper method to generate the URL for the Canvas Course tool.

src/test/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Add mock beans for new repositories required by the service layer.
Update test endpoint URLs to match the new routing structure.
Add license header to the test file.
Add necessary imports for Spring Security OAuth2 JWT testing and MockMvc request builders.
src/test/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.after: import org.springframework.security.core.GrantedAuthority; import org.springframework.security.core.authority.AuthorityUtils; import org.springframework.security.oauth2.jwt.Jwt; import org.springframework.security.oauth2.server.resource.authentication.JwtAuthenticationToken; import static org.springframework.security.test.web.servlet.request.SecurityMockMvcRequestPostProcessors.authentication; import static org.springframework.test.web.servlet.request.MockMvcRequestBuilders.post;

src/test/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Remove unused imports related to JUnit lifecycle and old result matchers.
src/test/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.before: import org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach; import org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.MockMvcResultMatchers; import static org.mockito.Mockito.when;

src/test/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Add mock beans for repositories required by the new security test scenarios.
src/test/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.after: @MockBean private WizardCourseStatusRepository wizardCourseStatusRepository; @MockBean private WizardUserCourseRepository wizardUserCourseRepository;

src/test/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Remove the setup method and constant that were specific to the old unsecured endpoint test.
src/test/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.before: public static String COURSE_ID_TST = "1234"; @BeforeEach public void setup() { String message = "Hello, 1234"; when(wizardService.sayHello(COURSE_ID_TST)).thenReturn(message); }

src/test/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.general_idea: Replace the single unsecured endpoint test with a comprehensive suite of security tests covering unauthorized, authorized, wrong scope, and open endpoints.
src/test/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.before: @Test public void restNoAuthnLaunch() throws Exception { //This is not a secured endpoint so should be successful SecurityContextHolder.getContext().setAuthentication(null); mvc.perform(get("/rest/1234/info") ...).andExpect(status().isOk()) ... }
src/test/java/edu/iu/uits/lms/coursesetu.after: @Test public void restNoAuthnLaunch() throws Exception { ... mvc.perform(get("/rest/coursestatus/all") ...).andExpect(status().isUnauthorized()); } @Test public void restAuthnLaunch() throws Exception { ... mvc.perform(get("/rest/coursestatus/all") ...).andExpect(status().isOk()); } @Test public void restAuthnLaunchWithWrongScope() throws Exception { ... mvc.perform(get("/rest/coursestatus/all") ...).andExpect(status().isForbidden()); } @Test public void restNoAuthnOpenEndpoint() throws Exception { ... mvc.perform(get("/rest/popup/1234/asdf/status") ...).andExpect(status().isOk()); } @Test public void restNoAuthnOpenEndpointPost() throws Exception { ... mvc.perform(post("/rest/popup/1234/asdf/dismiss") ...).andExpect(status().isOk()); }
